_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Regulation (EU) 2018/956 was repealed with effect from 1 July 2024; reporting periods prior to 1 July 2024 continue to be governed by the pre-amendment versions.
prior.source_span: Regulation (EU) 2018/956 is repealed with effect from 1 July 2024.
